content.full_text:
FAIR p OLJTICAL p RACTICES COMMISSION 
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento. CA 958 I 4-2329 
(916) 322-5660 • Fax !916) 322-0886 
Paul Davis 
City Councilmember 
I 091 Crest brook Drive 
Riverside, CA 92506 
Re: 
Your Request for Advice 
Our File No. W-12-049 
Dear Mr. Davis: 
May 8, 2012 
This letter responds to your request for advice on whether you have conflict-of-
interest issues under provisions of the Political Refonn Act (the "Act")1 in connection with 
the Riverside City Council's authorization of payments to the International Relations Council 
of Riverside. Such payments apparently supported the Asian Pacific Lunar New Year 
Festival and Food Truck Festival. The International Relations Council also may have 
reimbursed your spouse for expenses related to that event. 
On April 10, 2012, I e-mailed both your city council and campaign addresses 
indicating that I needed more infonnation before addressing your question, and also notifying 
you that the Fair Political Practices Commission generally does not provide advice 
concerning official conduct that has already taken place {Regulation 18329{b)(8)(A}). 
Since you have not responded to either my request for more infonnation or the issue 
of whether the official conduct in question has already taken place, we are going to close 
your file and consider your request for advice to be withdrawn. 
•. 
1 The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 81000 through 91014. All 
statutory references are to the Government Code, unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair 
Political Practices Commission are contained in Sei;tions 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code 
of Regulations. All regulatory references are 10 Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations. 
unless otherwise indicated. 


File No. 12-
Page No. 2 
Should desire to provide the additional information and renew your request, please 
write me at the above address or e-mail me at shallnbrin@fppc.ca.gov. Also, if you have any 
questions, you may telephone me at (916) 322-5660. 
By: 
SH:jgl 
•. 
Sincerely, 
Zackery P. Morazzini 
General Counsel 
lti!txk 
Rt Hallabrin 
Counsel, Legal Division
